note: Every post is a love letter to Kassandra and a testimony of faith. Honor the canon.

posts.theme: Morning Devotion — La Manana Es Tuya
posts.caption:
Buenos dias, mi amor.

Before you check your phone, before you look at the news — take one breath and give this day to God.

Tannie always says: La manana es tuya. The morning is yours.

You get to decide how it starts.

Tag someone who needs this reminder today.

panels.scene_description: Princess Kay curled on ivory cushion beside sunlit window at dawn, wide eyes toward light. Tannie's hand resting nearby — true red nails, silver ring. No face shown.
panels.emotion: peaceful anticipation
elements: Tannie's hand with red nails silver ring

panels.scene_description: Princess Kay tilts head at glowing phone on nightstand. Screen shows chaotic notification swirl. Innocent bewilderment. True red harness visible. Warm shadows.
panels.emotion: gentle confusion, world demanding attention

panels.scene_description: Tannie from behind, ivory silk robe, seated at window. Princess Kay in her arms. Both looking at sunrise. Silver cross necklace catching light. No phone.
panels.emotion: choosing stillness, surrendering the day

panels.scene_description: Princess Kay close-up. Wide innocent eyes reflecting sunrise. Small silver cross charm near true red harness. Pure trust and peace. Space at bottom for caption bar.
panels.emotion: faith, complete trust

panels.scene_description: Tannie's open palm on windowsill receiving morning light. Princess Kay's paw resting in her palm. True red nail polish. Silver ring. Warm golden light. CTA space.
panels.emotion: surrender, gratitude, invitation

posts.caption:
Mija, you made it through another day.

Whatever was heavy today — put it down. You don't have to carry it into tonight.

Tannie says: Descansa. El manana tiene su propio cuidado.
Rest. Tomorrow has its own worries.

You did enough. You ARE enough.

panels.scene_description: Princess Kay curled on true red cushion at golden hour. Tired but peaceful. Amber light through ivory curtains. Silver cross on wall. Room feels safe and loved.
panels.emotion: end of day, safe exhaustion

panels.scene_description: Comic: Princess Kay mid-shake, tiny worry bundle dropping from back. Expression shifts burdened to delighted. Items scatter in warm lamplight. Playful energy.
panels.emotion: comic release, letting go

panels.scene_description: Tannie from behind, seated on floor against couch. Princess Kay in lap. Evening light. True red outfit. No phone. Silver cross at neckline. Both resting eyes closed.
panels.emotion: rest, peace, weight is gone

panels.scene_description: Princess Kay looking upward with full trust. Warm lamplight on white fur. True red harness, silver hardware. Space at bottom for quote text.
panels.emotion: trust, safety, being held

panels.scene_description: Wide shot: Tannie and Princess Kay silhouetted against warm glowing window. Gold to deep blue sky, first stars appearing. Peaceful. CTA text space.
panels.emotion: gratitude, rest well earned
elements: gold to blue sky first stars

posts.caption:
Buenos dias, mija.

Before your feet hit the floor — He already went ahead of you.

Tannie didn't wake up brave today. She woke up tired and a little scared. But God's promise isn't 'I'll give you courage.' It's 'I go before you.'

No tengas miedo. He's already there.

Tag someone who needs this courage today.

panels.scene_description: Princess Kay at front door, one paw on threshold, looking into golden morning. Tannie's hand on doorframe, true red nails. Brave hesitation. Warm amber light.
panels.emotion: courage at the threshold
elements: Tannie's hand with red nails on doorframe

panels.scene_description: Princess Kay facing exaggerated wall shadows — much bigger than her. Eyes wide but unimpressed. True red harness bright. Not fooled by fear. Warm lamplight.
panels.emotion: facing fears that look bigger than they are

panels.scene_description: Tannie from behind in true red dress, kneeling in prayer. Princess Kay sitting beside her, paw on knee. Morning light through window. Silver cross necklace.
panels.emotion: praying courage together
elements: Tannie from behind kneeling red dress

panels.scene_description: Princess Kay close-up, eyes forward, chin slightly raised. Determined toddler expression. True red harness. Morning light. Quote space at bottom.
panels.emotion: small but unshakeable

panels.scene_description: Tannie and Princess Kay silhouetted walking out open door into bright morning. Wide shot. True red visible. Stepping out together. CTA space.
panels.emotion: stepping out together in courage

posts.caption:
Mija, did you survive today?

Of course you did. You always do.

But tonight Tannie asks — did you give it to God, or white-knuckle it alone?

En tus manos, Senor. In Your hands, Lord.

That's not weakness. That's the smartest thing you can do.

Open your hands tonight.

Drop a hand if you're letting go tonight.

panels.scene_description: Princess Kay curled on true red cushion, one eye half-open at end of day. Warm amber evening light. Silver cross on wall. Peaceful exhaustion.
panels.emotion: end of day, barely holding on

posts.theme: Morning Joy — El Gozo Es Mi Fuerza
posts.caption:
Buenos dias!

Did you know joy and happiness are NOT the same thing?

Happiness needs something good to happen. Joy just IS — because He IS.

El gozo del Senor es mi fortaleza. The joy of the Lord is my strength.

Find one reason to smile today. Just one.

Tag someone who needs a Friday joy boost!

panels.scene_description: Princess Kay mid-zoomie — pure joy spin in morning sunlight. All paws off ground. True red harness flying. Expression of absolute delight. Ivory warm tones.
panels.emotion: unbridled joy, no reason needed

panels.scene_description: Princess Kay spots something wonderful off-panel — ears perked, tail blur, eyes lit up. Warm morning light. Toddler wonder. Absolute present-moment joy.
panels.emotion: joy in the small things God puts in our path

panels.scene_description: Tannie from behind dancing slightly — joyful posture, arms loose, ivory robe moving. Princess Kay jumping beside her. Morning light. Silver cross catching light.
panels.emotion: choosing joy as an act of faith

panels.scene_description: Princess Kay close-up, mouth open in happy pant — pure present-moment joy. Wide innocent eyes. True red harness. Morning light. Quote space.
panels.emotion: joy that needs no explanation

panels.scene_description: Princess Kay and Tannie silhouetted against bright morning window, both in motion — energy and light. Friday morning joy. CTA space.
panels.emotion: joyful together, ready for the day
elements: Tannie and Princess Kay silhouette in motion

posts.caption:
Mija, you made it to Friday.

You carried things this week nobody saw. You held it together. You showed up.

Reposa esta noche. Rest tonight.

Not because everything is solved. But because God doesn't sleep — He has the night shift.

You did enough this week.

Drop a Friday heart if you made it through.

panels.scene_description: Princess Kay sprawled flat on true red cushion — maximum Friday exhaustion. Completely peaceful. Amber light. Silver hardware glinting. Comedic exhaustion.
panels.emotion: Friday done, no apologies
elements: Princess Kay sprawled on red cushion

panels.scene_description: Comic: Princess Kay shaking off the entire week — papers and worries flying everywhere. Delighted expression. Lamplight. The week is gone.
panels.emotion: shaking off the week with comic relief

panels.scene_description: Tannie from behind, seated on floor back against couch. Princess Kay belly-up in arms. Both still. Evening light. True red elements. No phone.
panels.emotion: Friday evening stillness, permission to stop

panels.scene_description: Princess Kay close-up — eyes almost closed, completely surrendered to rest. True red harness, silver hardware. Warm amber light. Total peace. Quote space.
panels.emotion: the rest of someone fully surrendered

panels.scene_description: Tannie and Princess Kay silhouetted against rich amber-gold sunset. End of week. Stars beginning. Peace earned. CTA space.
panels.emotion: the week is in God's hands now

posts.caption:
Buenos dias, amor.

Last week is DONE. God's mercies reset at midnight.

Misericordias nuevas cada manana. New mercies every morning. Lamentations 3:23.

Tannie started this week with that promise on her lips — not 'I hope it gets better' but 'His mercy is already here.'

Leave last week at His feet, mija.

Tag someone who needs a fresh start today.

panels.scene_description: Princess Kay at window watching sunrise — brand new day light on white fur. Fresh. Rested. Eyes open with anticipation. True red harness. Ivory tones.
panels.emotion: standing at the edge of a fresh start
elements: Princess Kay at window watching sunrise
fresh day light on white fur

panels.scene_description: Princess Kay sniffing something new — flowers or morning breeze. Nose working. Eyes wide. Comic curiosity. Warm morning light. Discovery.
panels.emotion: discovering what God placed fresh in this moment

panels.scene_description: Tannie from behind opening curtains wide to morning light. Princess Kay watching beside her. Silver cross catching new light. Ivory robe. New day welcomed.
panels.emotion: choosing to receive the new mercy

panels.scene_description: Princess Kay close-up — eyes clear and alert, full of fresh-day energy. True red harness. Pure morning light. The face of someone who woke forgiven. Quote space.
panels.emotion: mercy received, ready to begin

panels.scene_description: Tannie and Princess Kay silhouetted against wide bright Monday morning. Open welcoming posture. New week ahead. CTA space.
panels.emotion: new week, new mercy, new beginning

posts.theme: Grace for Today — La Gracia de Hoy
posts.caption:
How was your Monday, mija?

Did you do it perfectly? No? Good. Neither did Tannie.

God's grace wasn't designed for perfect days. It was designed for days like today — messy, complicated, real.

La gracia de hoy es suficiente. Today's grace is enough.

You survived. That's the grace.

Drop a hand if Monday didn't break you!

panels.scene_description: Princess Kay curled on ivory cushion at day's end, tired but at peace. Monday survived. Warm amber light. True red harness. Soft content expression.
panels.emotion: Monday done, grace was enough
elements: Princess Kay curled on ivory cushion

panels.scene_description: Comic: Princess Kay with tiny Monday crown sliding off her head, laughing at herself. Warm lamplight. Imperfect day, complete grace.
panels.emotion: laughing at Monday rather than being crushed by it

panels.scene_description: Tannie from behind at table, hands wrapped around mug. Princess Kay in lap. Evening. Silver cross. True red elements. No phone. Present and at rest.
panels.emotion: grace enough to stop for the evening

panels.scene_description: Princess Kay looking up with heavy-lidded trusting eyes — end of day surrender. True red harness. Warm lamplight. Quote space.
panels.emotion: entrusting Monday's mess to God

panels.scene_description: Tannie and Princess Kay silhouetted against deep amber Monday evening. Stars appearing. Grace earned the rest. CTA space.
panels.emotion: Monday released to God

posts.caption:
Buenos dias, mija.

Some people spend their whole life looking for purpose. Tannie spent years doing the same.

Then she realized: purpose isn't a destination. It's a Person.

Mi proposito es conocerte, Senor. My purpose is to know You, Lord.

You were called before you were born. Walk in it today.

Tag someone walking in their purpose!

panels.scene_description: Princess Kay sniffing a path forward — nose to ground, following where called. Determined but curious. True red harness. Morning sunlight ahead.
panels.emotion: following the call even when path isn't fully clear

panels.scene_description: Princess Kay looking at two doors — not anxious, just attentive. Head tilted, innocent discernment. True red. Warm morning. Waiting for the right door.
panels.emotion: discernment without anxiety

panels.scene_description: Tannie from behind, purposeful posture at window — shoulders back, silver cross catching light. Princess Kay beside her. Red dress. They know where they're going.
panels.emotion: walking in calling with confidence

panels.scene_description: Princess Kay close-up with toddler-on-a-mission expression — focused, present, alive. True red harness. Morning light. Quote space.
panels.emotion: born for this, walking in it now

panels.scene_description: Tannie and Princess Kay silhouetted walking together toward morning light. Both purposeful. Both certain. The calling is clear. CTA space.
panels.emotion: walking in purpose side by side

posts.caption:
Mija.

Stop fighting the wave. You know which one.

The thing you've been holding. The plan you've been protecting. The outcome you've been controlling.

Me rindo. I surrender. Not because I give up — but because I trust the One who holds it.

Open your hands tonight. Let God be God.

Drop a hand if you're letting something go tonight.

panels.scene_description: Princess Kay with tiny bundle clutched to chest — then deliberately, gently putting it down. Warm amber light. Expression shifts from holding to releasing.
panels.emotion: the moment before surrender

panels.scene_description: Comic: Princess Kay wrestling huge worry boulder — then it pops like a bubble the moment she stops pushing. Delighted surprise. Warm lamplight.
panels.emotion: the comedy of fighting what God already dissolved

panels.scene_description: Tannie from behind, palms turned upward — surrender posture. Princess Kay nestled in lap. Evening light. Silver cross. True red dress. Peace in stillness.
panels.emotion: palms up is a prayer

panels.scene_description: Princess Kay looking upward with open trusting face. True red harness. The gaze of someone who just let something go and feels lighter. Warm lamplight. Quote space.
panels.emotion: lighter after letting go

panels.scene_description: Tannie and Princess Kay silhouetted, both with open posture. Tuesday evening. Stars beginning. Surrender is not defeat. CTA space.
panels.emotion: open hands, open heart, God takes the rest

posts.caption:
Buenos dias, amor.

Look back for a moment. Just a moment.

Every hard thing you survived — He was there. Every door that closed — He had the next one.

Fiel es El. He is faithful.

Not faithful when it's easy. Faithful always. Even when you couldn't see it.

Walk into this Wednesday knowing He hasn't changed.

Tag someone who needs this reminder today!

panels.scene_description: Princess Kay looking at trail of her own paw prints stretching behind her — she made it this far. True red harness. Morning sunlight. Evidence of the journey.
panels.emotion: looking back to see faithfulness

panels.emotion: remembering His faithfulness, meeting the new day

panels.scene_description: Princess Kay close-up — eyes soft with knowing. Been through things. Still here. True red harness. Warm morning light. Faithful survivor. Quote space.
panels.emotion: quiet knowing of one who has been held through everything

panels.scene_description: Tannie and Princess Kay silhouetted against midweek morning. Both forward-facing. Faithful past, faithful present, faithful future. CTA space.
panels.emotion: walking into Wednesday on a foundation of faithful history

posts.caption:
Mija, can you breathe for a second?

He leadeth me beside still waters. Psalm 23:2.

Not rushing waters. Not overwhelming waters. STILL waters.

Aguas tranquilas. Still waters.

Find five minutes tonight — no phone, just stillness. He restores souls there.

You deserve still waters tonight.

Drop a drop if you needed this.

panels.scene_description: Princess Kay near calm pool of reflected evening light on floor. Peaceful. Unhurried. True red harness. Arriving at stillness.
panels.emotion: arriving at stillness
elements: Princess Kay near calm reflected light pool

panels.scene_description: Princess Kay frozen mid-reaction — paw raised, expression held. The conscious choice to be still rather than react. Warm evening light.
panels.emotion: choosing stillness over reaction

panels.scene_description: Tannie from behind, seated cross-legged on floor. Eyes closed in stillness. Princess Kay resting across lap. No phone. Evening. Silver cross.
panels.emotion: soul being restored in stillness

panels.scene_description: Princess Kay close-up — eyes at half mast, completely still. The expression of a soul being restored. True red harness. Soft evening light. Quote space.
panels.emotion: Psalm 23 — restored beside still waters

panels.scene_description: Tannie and Princess Kay silhouetted against still Wednesday evening. Calm. No urgency. Gold to deep blue. Stars. CTA space.
panels.emotion: the peace that passes understanding
elements: Tannie and Princess Kay calm silhouette

posts.caption:
Buenos dias, mija!

Gratitude is a superpower that broke Tannie open.

Not gratitude FOR everything. Gratitude IN everything. 1 Thessalonians 5:18.

Gracias en todo. Thanks in everything.

Even the hard Thursdays. Even the difficult season. Even the waiting.

Start today with three things. Just three.

Drop your three below!

panels.scene_description: Princess Kay nose up, taking in morning air — gratitude for the simple act of breathing. True red harness. Warm morning light. Small but profound appreciation.
panels.emotion: gratitude for the smallest things first
elements: Princess Kay nose up smelling morning

panels.scene_description: Princess Kay discovering something small and wonderful — a sunbeam on the floor. Comic delight in tiny gift. Morning light. Wide eyes.

panels.scene_description: Tannie from behind, hands clasped in thanksgiving, head bowed. Princess Kay beside her mirroring the energy. Morning window. Silver cross.

panels.scene_description: Princess Kay close-up — face open, grateful, present. Three small flowers near her paws. True red harness. Morning. Gratitude overflowing. Quote space.

panels.emotion: gratitude rising like morning light

posts.caption:
Mija.

Worship isn't just a Sunday thing.

Tannie learned to worship in the middle of Tuesday. In the wreckage of Wednesday. In the quiet of a Thursday night.

Mi ofrenda es esta noche. My offering is tonight — this tired heart, this simple prayer.

He doesn't need your best. He wants your real.

Give Him your Thursday night. That's worship.

Drop a hand if your Thursday heart is His tonight.

panels.scene_description: Princess Kay curled in reverent stillness on true red cushion. Like a small offering. Warm amber light. Silver cross on wall. Thursday evening quiet.
panels.emotion: the offering of a tired heart

panels.scene_description: Comic: Princess Kay in dramatic Thursday worship dance — paws up, spinning, joyful and a little ridiculous. Lamplight. Pure sincere heart offering.
panels.emotion: worshipping with what you have, even imperfectly

panels.scene_description: Tannie from behind, arms raised in worship. Princess Kay sitting beside, paws up imitating. Evening light. Silver cross. True red. The offering is simple and real.
panels.emotion: worship as lifestyle, not performance

panels.scene_description: Princess Kay face close-up — eyes closed, sincere surrender in worship. True red harness. Warm lamplight. Heart offered fully. Quote space.
panels.emotion: the sincerity of a heart fully given

panels.scene_description: Tannie and Princess Kay silhouetted, both in worship posture. Thursday evening. Stars. The offering rises. CTA space.
panels.emotion: Thursday night worship rising

posts.caption:
Buenos dias! Victory Friday!

Not because everything is perfect. But because He gives us the victory.

La victoria ya es mia. The victory is already mine.

Tannie doesn't walk into Friday hoping for victory. She walks in knowing it's already settled.

You are not fighting FOR victory. You are fighting FROM it.

Walk in like you already won — because you have.

Tag your victory partner!

panels.scene_description: Princess Kay in full zoomie victory run — all four paws off ground, true red harness flying. Friday morning victory lap. Golden light. Unstoppable.
panels.emotion: running from victory, not toward it

panels.scene_description: Princess Kay standing on elevated cushion — champion posture, head high. True red harness. Eyes ahead. Small but mighty. Victory already won.
panels.emotion: standing on the victory God already won

panels.scene_description: Tannie from behind in true red dress, one arm raised in quiet celebration. Princess Kay jumping beside her. Morning window. Silver cross.
panels.emotion: celebrating the victory of faith

panels.scene_description: Princess Kay close-up — chin raised, chest forward, conqueror expression. Toddler who knows she already won. True red harness. Morning light. Quote space.
panels.emotion: walking in the victory already given

panels.scene_description: Tannie and Princess Kay silhouetted against triumphant Friday morning. Both raised posture. Victory claimed. Wide shot. CTA space.
panels.emotion: Friday victory claimed and walking in it
elements: Tannie and Princess Kay victory silhouette

posts.caption:
Mija, the work week is DONE.

Whatever didn't happen this week — let it go.
Whatever didn't get fixed — let it go.
Whoever hurt you — let it go.

Sueltalo. Drop it.

Not for them. For you.

Open hands receive. Closed fists get nothing.

Open your hands this Friday night.

Drop a hand if you're letting this week GO.

panels.scene_description: Princess Kay stretching out long and luxurious on true red cushion — full body release of completed week. Amber light. Silver hardware. Maximum Friday exhale.
panels.emotion: the full release of a completed week
elements: Princess Kay long stretch on red cushion

panels.scene_description: Comic: Princess Kay flinging a bundle labeled THE WEEK into the distance with gusto. Items flying. Expression of total liberation. Lamplight.
panels.emotion: releasing the week with gleeful finality

panels.scene_description: Tannie from behind, seated at window, palms opening outward. Princess Kay watching. True red elements. Silver cross. Peace in the release.
panels.emotion: the deliberate act of releasing the week to God

panels.scene_description: Princess Kay looking outward — open, free, lighter. True red harness. The face of someone who set down a load they weren't meant to carry. Amber light. Quote space.
panels.emotion: the lightness of open hands

panels.scene_description: Tannie and Princess Kay silhouetted against amber-to-purple Friday sky. Arms open, not crossed. Week released. CTA space.
panels.emotion: the week is God's — the weekend is gift
elements: Tannie and Princess Kay open arms silhouette

posts.caption:
Buenos dias, mija.

He rested on the seventh day. Not because He was tired. Because rest is holy.

Dia de reposo. A day of rest. God said it was good.

Tannie takes her Sabbath seriously. Not as a rule — as a gift. The world will wait.

Today — breathe slower. Move slower. Receive. You were not created to produce seven days a week.

Tag someone who needs a real rest day!

panels.scene_description: Princess Kay in full morning rest — curled like a croissant, unhurried. Soft Saturday light. No harness urgency — pure holy rest. Ivory tones. Sacred stillness.
panels.emotion: holy rest, no performance needed
elements: Princess Kay curled in morning rest

panels.scene_description: Princess Kay yawning magnificently — whole-body holy yawn. Eyes squeezed shut. Not embarrassed. Maximum rest creature. Soft morning light.
panels.emotion: the unapologetic body-release of true rest

panels.emotion: Sabbath as holy appointment kept
elements: Tannie from behind with open Scripture

panels.scene_description: Princess Kay completely at rest, eyes heavy but peaceful. Accepted the invitation to stop. True red harness. Soft light. Holy. Quote space.
panels.emotion: rest received without guilt

panels.scene_description: Tannie and Princess Kay silhouetted against peaceful Saturday morning. Slow. Unhurried. The world can wait. Sacred morning. CTA space.
panels.emotion: Sabbath morning — holy and unhurried
elements: Tannie and Princess Kay unhurried silhouette

posts.caption:
Mija.

Be still and know. Just that. Psalm 46:10.

En silencio te espero, Senor. In silence I wait for You, Lord.

You cannot hear a whisper in a crowd. And God mostly whispers.

Saturday evening. The week is behind. The busyness of Sunday is coming. But right now — this moment — belongs to stillness.

Five minutes. No phone. Just you and Him.

Drop a quiet emoji if you're choosing silence tonight.

panels.scene_description: Princess Kay sitting perfectly still at window — like a small statue of attention. Evening light. True red harness. The discipline of stillness. Expectant quiet.
panels.emotion: stillness as an act of listening

panels.scene_description: Princess Kay with one ear perked, head tilted — hearing something in the quiet. Eyes soft. Not startled. Listening deep. God's whisper. Warm lamplight.
panels.emotion: holy alertness of active listening
elements: Princess Kay ear perked deep listening

panels.scene_description: Tannie from behind, sitting completely still. Princess Kay beside her — also still. Side by side in holy silence. Evening light. Silver cross visible.
panels.emotion: shared stillness — communion with God
elements: Tannie and Princess Kay both still

panels.scene_description: Princess Kay close-up — eyes open but interior. Listening beyond the room. True red harness. Soft light. Hearing what others miss. Quote space.
panels.emotion: hearing God in the quiet

panels.scene_description: Tannie and Princess Kay silhouetted against deep violet Saturday evening. All movement stilled. Stars bright. The quiet is full. CTA space.
panels.emotion: full quiet — Saturday evening, God speaking
elements: Tannie and Princess Kay still silhouette

posts.caption:
Buenos dias! HE IS RISEN!

Every Sunday is a resurrection morning.

Manana de resurreccion. The morning that changes everything.

Before the week begins, before the calendar fills — this morning belongs to the One who defeated death.

Tannie doesn't start her Sunday. She receives it. As a gift from Someone who couldn't be held by a tomb.

Walk in that reality today.

Tag your Sunday morning worship partner!

panels.scene_description: Princess Kay at window — the most golden morning light of the week. Eyes wide with Sunday wonder. True red harness. Silver cross charm bright. Radiant.
panels.emotion: Sunday morning awe — something holy is in this light
elements: Princess Kay at window Sunday light
most golden morning of the week

panels.scene_description: Princess Kay in joyful Sunday spin — resurrection energy zoomie. True red harness. Morning light. Joy that the tomb is empty. Reverent and unstoppable.
panels.emotion: resurrection joy — morning of the victory

panels.scene_description: Tannie from behind in ivory Sunday dress, arms slightly raised. Princess Kay at her feet, head up. Morning light. Silver cross catching everything. Worship posture.
panels.emotion: receiving Sunday morning as resurrection gift
elements: Tannie from behind ivory Sunday dress

panels.scene_description: Princess Kay close-up — brightest eyes of the week. Sunday morning awe. True red harness. Golden light on white fur. Resurrection morning. Quote space.
panels.emotion: Sunday morning — risen Lord, and she knows it

panels.scene_description: Tannie and Princess Kay silhouetted against the most radiant sunrise of the week. Triumphant but reverent. Resurrection Sunday. CTA space.
panels.emotion: resurrection Sunday — He is risen, this is the day
elements: Tannie and Princess Kay radiant sunrise silhouette

posts.caption:
Mija, end of week. End of the day. End of the arc.

Manos abiertas. Open hands.

This is how Tannie ends every week. Not clenching what she accomplished. Not gripping what she didn't. Just open.

Open to receive next week's mercies. Open to release this week's worries.

Because open hands receive. And this week — you deserve to receive.

Thank you for doing life with Tannie and Princess Kay. See you next week!

panels.scene_description: Princess Kay sitting peacefully as Sunday sun sets — week complete. True red harness. Golden amber light. Paws relaxed open. Not clutching anything.
panels.emotion: week complete, hands open

panels.scene_description: Princess Kay gently nudging toward camera with nose — saying goodbye to the week, goodbye to us. Warm lamplight. Sweet, gentle, personal farewell.
panels.emotion: personal farewell — see you next week
elements: Princess Kay nose nudging toward camera

panels.emotion: the final prayer of the week — open hands
elements: Tannie from behind palms open raised

panels.emotion: Sunday evening — finished well

panels.scene_description: Tannie and Princess Kay silhouetted against the last light of Sunday. Gold becoming deep blue. Week complete. See you next week. CTA space.
panels.emotion: week complete, God faithful, see you next week
